request_payload.exposure_text: As a mother and grandmother, I've always believed in standing with our allies. But have you noticed how our current commitments sometimes leave us carrying more than our fair share? Just last month, I read about how [Allied Nation] is reducing their defense budget while ours keeps growing. It's not about being weak - it's about being smart. We should make sure every ally pulls their weight before asking more from our families. #StrongAlliances #FairSharing
